alert_data.rule_description: sshd: Attempt to login using a non-existent user

investigation.historical_pattern: Same alert occurs daily at 00:00 UTC

investigation_notes: Internal IP from backup server subnet. Username follows service account pattern (svc-*). Occurs at midnight - matches cron job timing. Historical data shows this happens daily. Likely outdated service account credentials in backup job configuration.
resolution: Closed as benign - misconfigured service account. Remediation ticket created.
